passive.name: Mortal Will
passive.description: Every few spells or attacks, Pantheon's next spell is empowered.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Pantheon}} generates stacks of ''Mortal Will'' whenever he lands a basic attacks or casts an ability. At max stacks, his next basic ability consumes them to become empowered with an additional effect.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Pantheon''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Mortal Will'' whenever he lands a [[basic attack]] {{tip|on-hit}} or casts an [[ability]], stacking up to 5 times. At 5 stacks, '''Pantheon's''' next basic ability consumes the stacks to become empowered with an additional effect.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Pantheon''' gains maximum stacks of ''Mortal Will'' upon starting the game, completing a {{si|Recall}} channel, and [[death|respawning]].
wiki_detail.notes: * The current number of ''Mortal Will'' stacks is represented by a counter under '''Pantheon's''' [[health bar]], visible to all players. It will light up when he reaches maximum stacks and the empowered effect is ready.

Q.name: Comet Spear
Q.description: Pantheon either thrusts his spear or throws his spear in the chosen direction.
Q.tooltip:
Tap: Pantheon thrusts his spear, dealing {{ tapdamagecalc }} physical damage to enemies hit. Refunds {{ tapcooldownrefund*100 }}% of this Ability's Cooldown.

Hold: Pantheon hurls his spear, dealing {{ holddamagecalc }} physical damage to the first enemy hit and {{ damagefalloff*100 }}% less to further targets. 

This Ability is enhanced against enemies below {{ crithealththreshold*100 }}% Health to deal {{ executedamagecalcmodified }} physical damage instead.

Mortal Will Bonus: Deals an additional {{ empowereddamagecalc }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Pantheon}} {{tip|channel|charges}} up to a few seconds, increasing the {{sti|range}} of his spear. After a brief period, it becomes empowered with a new effect.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Comet Spear'' can be recast within the duration, and will cancel automatically afterwards, refunding a portion of the {{sti|mana|{{as|mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3:
{{sbc|Recast:}} '''Pantheon''' thrusts his spear in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, increased against enemies at {{as|low health}}. This also {{sti|cdr|reduces}} the cooldown.

{{sbc|Empowered Recast:}} '''Pantheon''' hurls his spear in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, increased against enemies at {{as|low health}} and reduced against enemies beyond the first.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}} Bonus:}} The spear gains {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Pantheon''' {{tip|channel|charges}} while being {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 10% for up to 4 seconds to increase ''Comet Spear's'' {{sti|range}} after {{fd|0.35}} seconds of channeling. ''Comet Spear'' can be recast within the duration.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Pantheon''' hurls his spear in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, {{ccs|increased|physical}} against enemies {{as|below 20% of their '''maximum''' health}} but reduced by 50% against enemies beyond the first.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Hurl Physical Damage|{{ap|70 to 190}} {{as|(+ 115% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}|Increased Hurl Damage|{{ap|155 to 455}} {{as|(+ 230% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}}}}
{{st|Hurl Secondary Physical Damage|{{ap|70*0.5 to 190*0.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|115*0.5}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|50*0.5}}% AP)}}|Increased Hurl Secondary Damage|{{ap|155*0.5 to 455*0.5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|230*0.5}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|100*0.5}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Releasing the ability within {{fd|0.35}} seconds causes '''Pantheon''' to instead thrust his spear in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, {{ccs|increased|physical}} against enemies {{as|below 20% of their '''maximum''' health}}, and refunding 60% of ''Comet Spear's'' {{sti|cooldown}}. The thrust's damage is not reduced against enemies beyond the first.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Thrust Physical Damage|{{ap|70 to 190}} {{as|(+ 115% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Increased Thrust Damage|{{ap|155 to 455}} {{as|(+ 230% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Comet Spear's'' total damage is increased to 105% against {{tip|monsters}} and reduced to 70% against {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.description5: If the charge is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} or completes without reactivation, ''Comet Spear'' is cancelled and the ability is put on full cooldown but refunds {{sti|mana|{{as|half the mana cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.description6: {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}:}} ''Comet Spear'' deals {{as|{{pp|20 to 240}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 115% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, affected by the previous damage reductions. Consumes the stacks upon recasting.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|-40 - 560|Rectangle starts at 40 units behind Pantheon and has 600 units length}} / {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1200|Spear missile range}}

W.name: Shield Vault
W.description: Pantheon dashes to a target, damaging and stunning them.
W.tooltip:
Pantheon leaps on his target, Stunning for {{ stunduration }} second and dealing {{ maxhealthdamagecalc }} max Health physical damage.

Mortal Will Bonus: Pantheon's next Attack strikes {{ empowerednumhits }} times, dealing a total of {{ empowereddamagemultcalcmodified }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Pantheon}} {{tip|dash|leaps}} to the target enemy, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|stun|stunning}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}} Bonus:}} '''Pantheon's''' next basic attack within a few seconds will strike 3 times to deal {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Pantheon''' {{tip|dash|leaps}} to the front of the target enemy's location. If the target is within 800 units upon arrival, he deals {{as|physical damage}} and {{tip|stun|stuns}} them for 1 second. Against minions and monsters, ''Shield Vault'' has a minimum damage of 60 and is capped at 200.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|6 to 8}}% of target's '''maximum''' health}} {{as|(+ {{fd|1.5}}% per 100 AP)}} {{as|(+ {{fd|0.4}}% per 100 '''Pantheon's''' '''bonus''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}:}} '''Pantheon''' empowers his next basic attack within 4 seconds to have a cast time and strike the target 3 times over a brief period, dealing {{as|{{pp|120/3 to 165/3|key=%}} AD}} {{as|physical damage}} per hit, up to {{as|{{pp|120 to 165|key=%}} AD}}. Each hit is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers and applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Empowered Shield Vault {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Pantheon's''' basic attack timer. '''Pantheon''' will attempt to basic attack the target at the end of the leap.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} on the initial vault. Deals {{tip|basic damage}} on all the attacks from the empowered ability.
* Despite the multi-hit attack only having a hidden {{fd|0.375}}-second cast time, '''Pantheon''' will remain {{tip|lockout|unable to act}} until the last strike has been dealt.
** The empowered attack's total time is affected by '''Pantheon's''' {{stil|attack speed}}.
** {{pending for test}} The attack's total time is the cast time plus '''Pantheon's''' attack windup time.
* The 3 strikes that occurs after ''Empowered Shield Vault'' each apply a stack of {{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}, even if the attacks are {{tip|dodged}}, {{tip|blocked}}, or missed while '''Pantheon''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]].

E.name: Aegis Assault
E.description: Pantheon sets his shield, becoming invulnerable to damage from the front and striking repeatedly with his spear.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Pantheon}} braces his shield in the target direction and {{tip|channel|channels}} for a brief period, during which he becomes {{tip|invulnerability|invulnerable}} against non-{{tip|turret}} damage from enemies in that direction. He will also strike in a cone that continually deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Aegis Assault'' can be recast within this time, and does so automatically after the duration. The channel cannot be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Pantheon''' slams his shield in a cone, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}} Bonus:}} '''Pantheon''' briefly gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} after recasting.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Pantheon''' braces his shield in the target direction and {{tip|channel|channels}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, during which he becomes {{tip|invulnerability|invulnerable}} to non-{{tip|turret}} damage dealt by enemies from the target direction. He also continually performs strikes in a cone in front of him, dealing {{as|{{fd|8.{{recurring|3}}}}% AD}} {{as|physical damage}} every {{fd|0.125}} seconds to enemies hit, reduced by 50% against {{tip|minions}} and up to {{as|100% AD}} {{as|'''total''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Aegis Assault'' can be recast after {{fd|0.3}} seconds, and does so automatically after the duration. ''Aegis Assault's'' channel cannot be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} by {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Pantheon''' slams with his shield in a cone in front of him, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}:}} After recasting, '''Pantheon''' gains {{pp|5 to 30}} {{as|(+ {{fd|2.5}}% '''bonus''' health)}} {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}}}} for 4 seconds as well as {{sti|{{as|60% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|525|Cone radius, truncated in the back so it cannot hit behind Pantheon}}
wiki_detail.notes:
*The initial cast count as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
**Detonating the ability manually is not.
* '''Pantheon''' retains his {{tip|invulnerable|invulnerability}} during the recast's cast time.
{{Effect at cast time start}}** '''Pantheon''' will slam from wherever he was at the start of the recast's' cast time.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block the slam's damage.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Pantheon''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=false|move=true|cast=false|items=true,,, false|spells=true, true, true, false, false|interrupts=death}}

R.name: Grand Starfall
R.description: Pantheon composes himself and then leaps into the air, landing at a chosen location as a comet.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Pantheon gains {{ armorpenetration*100 }}% Armor Penetration.

Active: Pantheon gathers his strength to leap high into the air. He throws his spear from above which in a small area deals {{ spell.pantheonq:holddamagecalc }} physical damage and Slows by {{ spearslow*100 }}% for {{ spearslowduration }} seconds. 

Pantheon then crashes down as a meteor at the target area. Deals up to {{ damagecalc }} magic damage to enemies in a line (decreased by up to {{ edgedamagereduction*100 }}% at the edges of the area).

This Ability instantly readies Mortal Will.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Pantheon''' {{tip|channel|channels}}, then leaps high into the air. After a short time, he throws a spear at the target location that deals {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|slows}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Pantheon''' then crashes down and creates a shockwave alongside himself that travels toward the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb4: '''Pantheon''' gains full stacks of {{sbc|{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}}} upon landing.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Pantheon''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for 2 seconds, then leaps high into the air, {{tip|vanish|vanishing}} and becoming {{tip|cc-immune|immune to crowd control}} until he reappears. While in the air, '''Pantheon''' {{tip|channel|channels}} again for {{fd|2.25}} seconds and grants {{tip|sight}} around the target location {{fd|0.5}} seconds into the channel.
wiki_detail.description3: After {{tt|{{fd|0.8}}|Estimated}} seconds into the channel, '''Pantheon''' prepares for landing by hurling his spear to the target location over {{tt|{{fd|0.2}}|Estimated}} seconds that deals {{as|{{pp|type=[[File:Comet Spear.png|20px|border]] ''Comet Spear's'' rank|40 to 190 for 6|0 to 5|formula=40 + 30 per rank of ''Comet Spear''}} {{as|(+ 115% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}} physical damage|physical damage}} to enemies near its landing point and {{tip|slows}} them by 50% for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: Over the remaining {{tt|{{fd|1.25}}|Estimated}} seconds, '''Pantheon''' crashes down after {{tt|{{fd|0.55}}|Estimated}} seconds and creates a shockwave alongside himself that travels toward the target location over {{tt|{{fd|0.7}}|Estimated}} seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit, reduced by up to 50% for those hit at the edge of the area. Upon completion of the channel, '''Pantheon''' {{tip|blink|reappears}} at the target location and gains maximum stacks of ''{{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}''.
wiki_detail.leveling4: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|300 to 700}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}}|Reduced Damage|{{ap|300/2 to 700/2}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description5: ''Grand Starfall'' is put on a {{sti|cd|30-second}} cooldown if the first channel is canceled.
wiki_detail.description6: ''Grand Starfall will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|450|Outer width, reduced damage}} / {{tt|125|Inner width, maximum damage}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Grand Starfall's'' first channel can be interrupted by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}, but its second channel cannot because '''Pantheon''' gains crowd control immunity during it.
* The spear's damage is not empowered by {{ai|Mortal Will|Pantheon}}, nor increased against enemies below {{as|20% of their '''maximum''' health}}.
* During the second channel, '''Pantheon''' gains a {{tip|minimum health threshold}} of 1.
** '''Pantheon''' will instantly die upon reappearing if he reaches this threshold.
* Abilities that target '''Pantheon''' will redirect to the last location.
* [[Ping|Pinging]] the ability will inform allies in [[Hotkeys and commands|chat]] which {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy champions are in range of ''Grand Starfall''.
* '''Pantheon''' is considered to be in his original casting position even after leaping, but he will {{tip|blink}} to the target location the moment the second channel completes.
* Using ''Grand Starfall'' will inform allies with a ping.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Pantheon''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}} (first channel):
{{ct|channel|items=false|spells=false|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|consume=false|interrupts=death, ground, root, silence}}
* The cast time and second channel have the same interactions except they can only be interrupted by {{tip|death}}.
* ''Grand Starfall's'' first channel will also be interrupted if he enters the {{ai|Realm of Death|Mordekaiser}}.
